No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly lists '醫療保健' (healthcare) as a potential text topic for student translation, directly linking to various health-related targets within this SDG.

Quality Education.reason: As an advanced, required university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also fosters cultural understanding and appreciation (Target 4.7), essential for global citizenship and sustainable development.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to water or sanitation issues.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops professional Turkish translation skills and the ability to participate in international affairs, directly enhancing students' employability and contributing to decent work opportunities (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course fosters the appreciation of diverse cultures (Core Competence E), which promotes intercultural understanding and social inclusion, directly contributing to reducing inequalities (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course emphasizes mastering and understanding Turkish culture and involves translating cultural texts, directly contributing to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to sustainable consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to climate change mitigation or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course involves translating '政治' (politics) texts, which can indirectly contribute to understanding governance and institutions. Fostering international communication also weakly supports peace.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly develops the ability to participate in international affairs and communicate across fields (Core Competencies C, D), which are crucial for fostering international partnerships and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
